rationale: Acting on Review 2 fixes the single clear misnomer (mem_sup_adjoin_sq_of_exists takes/uses no hx2 unlike siblings mem_sup_adjoin_sq and exists_add_mul_of_mem_sup_adjoin_sq, and _of_exists is non-idiomatic) which a maintainer would want corrected for precision in the new Quadratic.lean API. Review 1's issues are either contested (renaming squareClass_of_* theorems away from the documented technique/file name SquareClass.lean and math context) or minor (private algebraMap_eq_iff; optional removal of rfl defs), so its changes yield at best equivalent or noisier results.
